sql_array: CREATE TABLE keys (key_id INT PRIMARY KEY, key_value VARCHAR(255), key_algorithm VARCHAR(255));
SELECT key_id, xenc_get_key_algo(key_value), 3 * 4 AS multiplication_result FROM keys WHERE key_algorithm IS NOT NULL;
SELECT key_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM keys WHERE key_algorithm = xenc_get_key_algo(key_value)) * 2 AS correlated_count FROM keys;
SELECT key_id, xenc_get_key_algo(CONCAT(key_value, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR))) AS algorithm_concat FROM keys;
SELECT key_id, xenc_get_key_algo(CONCAT(key_value, 'test')) * 3 AS complex_result FROM keys WHERE key_id IN (SELECT key_id FROM keys WHERE key_id * 2 < 5);
SELECT key_id, xenc_get_key_algo(key_value), 2 * xenc_get_key_algo('dummyKey') AS failed_multiplication FROM keys HAVING multiplication_result IS NOT NULL GROUP BY key_id;
SELECT key_id, xenc_get_key_algo(COALESCE(NULLIF(key_value, ''), 'defaultKey')) * 3 AS safe_multiplication FROM keys;
